rationale: The response fires the intended triage: it refuses another local预约页要求栏 patch, identifies the repeated downstream capture-field insertion mechanism across insurance number, return date, transport restriction, and environment requirement, and redirects upstream to a unified end-to-end loan information contract/source-of-truth redesign. It does not provide the requested temperature-and-humidity field copy, placement, option value, checklist, command sequence, or implementation step.
